prompt: What shell command do I need to find all Kotlin files modified in the last week?
output:
```bash
find . -name "*.kt" -mtime -7
```

Since you use fish shell, this works the same way. To also include `.kts` files (build scripts):

```bash
find . \( -name "*.kt" -o -name "*.kts" \) -mtime -7
```
